raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a matrix",
    "b must be a matrix",
    "a and b must be compatible for matrix multiplication"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is the matrix product of a and b",
    "the result is assigned back to a"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a or b is not a matrix",
    "a and b are not compatible for matrix multiplication",
    "a or b is empty",
    "a or b contains non-numeric values"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a matrix",
    "b must be a matrix",
    "a and b must have the same number of rows",
    "b must have one more column than a"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a matrix with the same number of rows as a and the same number of columns as b",
    "the result is the matrix product of a and b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if a or b is a scalar, it is treated as a column vector",
    "if a or b is a vector, it is treated as a column vector",
    "if a or b is a zero matrix, the result is a zero matrix"
  ]
}
